name: Holmes and Watson First Meeting
description: Stamford introduces Watson to Holmes in the chemical laboratory at St. Bartholomew's Hospital. Holmes immediately deduces Watson has been in Afghanistan. Both are looking for lodgings; Holmes proposes 221B Baker Street. This meeting sets in motion the entire Holmes canon.

name: The Reichenbach Falls Confrontation
description: Holmes and Moriarty struggle at the edge of the Reichenbach Falls. Holmes sends Watson away on a false errand; when Watson returns, both men are gone. The world believes both dead. Holmes later reveals he survived using Baritsu, spent three years traveling under the alias Sigerson.

name: Holmes's Return to London
description: Three years after Reichenbach, Holmes returns to London and reveals himself to Watson in disguise. He explains he traveled as Sigerson — through Tibet, Persia, Mecca, and France — waiting for Moriarty's network to be neutralized. Watson faints upon the revelation. Holmes's immediate purpose is to deal with Colonel Moran.
